key_themes: Micro-cap funding (CLN, ATM) in volatile penny stock
summary: Hamak Strategy Limited (FRA: J9J / LSE: HAMA, formerly Hamak Gold) is a micro-cap (~£4.7m market cap) gold explorer in West Africa that added a Bitcoin and physical gold treasury strategy in 2025. Very recent positive catalysts include the start of resource drilling at the Akoko Gold Project in Ghana (April 2026) and additional BTC/gold bullion purchases, following beneficial JV work on the Nimba project before resuming 100% ownership. Sentiment is cautiously optimistic on operational progress and commodity exposure but is restrained by ongoing board churn, negative earnings, extremely low liquidity, and almost no visible retail investor or social media discussion.[[1]](https://markets.ft.com/data/equities/tearsheet/summary?s=J9J:FRA)[[2]](https://www.marketscreener.com/quote/stock/HAMAK-STRATEGY-LIMITED-201433100/news-insiders/)[[3]](https://hamakstrategy.com/regulatory-updates/nimba-joint-venture-update/)
sources: 10+ recent RNS/company announcements (2025-2026), 0 relevant investor X/Twitter posts found (mostly unrelated spam/codes), FT.com, Bloomberg, Marketscreener, Yahoo Finance, company site (hamakstrategy.com)
